prompt: Generate a collage style similar to the image of flowers in a garden.
prompt_refined: Generate a botanical collage artwork, drawing inspiration from the style and composition of image 1. The image should feature a central cluster of vintage botanical elements: a large, detailed grayscale rose, with a vibrant yellow daisy-like flower positioned below it. Various leaves, depicted in a mix of grayscale and muted tones, should surround these flowers. A colorful bird should be perched on a branch at the top-right of the main floral arrangement. Integrate torn paper fragments in muted earth tones as layered elements within the collage. The overall image should have a light, textured background similar to image 1.
objects: Vibrant yellow daisy-like flower positioned below the rose
Various leaves in a mix of grayscale and muted tones, surrounding the flowers
Colorful bird perched on a branch at the top-right of the main floral arrangement
Torn paper fragments in muted earth tones, integrated as layered elements
